name: Jibril
description: A strange student with weak sense of boundary.

0: Hm, it's afternoon already... I suppose I could use a little nap.
What? I can still fall asleep even if you stare.
1: If you need anything, just ask. Nothing couldn't be solved with a little money.
2: Heh, You've got quite taste for friends.
Not that I mind about it.
3: ...Do you have something to say to me? No? Very well. Leave me alone then.
